user.title: Configure Pollen Information
user.description: Enter your polleninformation.at API key and the location you want to monitor. Data is provided by the Österreichischer Polleninformationsdienst (www.polleninformation.at).

data.country: Country (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2, e.g. AT, DE, CH)

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to polleninformation.at. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API key. Request a valid key via the polleninformation.at contact form.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Pollen Information location is already configured.
